_method: Grow composite star rating (TEST — Glenvale only). Each pillar scored 0-5 vs target by linear interpolation between three anchors: floor=0 stars, target=3 stars, stretch=5 stars (clamped 0-5). Anchors — Sales YoY: floor -8%, target +8%, stretch +20%. Customer Google-health: floor 1.66, target 3.32, stretch 5.0. People = 50/50 blend of RMS-health (floor 1.66/target 3.32/stretch 5.0) and RTW% completed (floor 0/target 80/stretch 100). OPERATIONS = equal-thirds blend of (a) avg F1 race score (floor 320/target 190/stretch 130, lower=better), (b) brand-audit QTD /5 (floor 4.0/target 4.5/stretch 5.0), and (c) COMPLIANCE = coaching-checklist % of standard (floor 50/target 85/stretch 100). Composite = simple average of the four pillars. All quarter-to-date (Q2 2026, 1 Apr-14 Jun). NOTE: open/close checklist % is NOT yet in compliance — the HRP Process St open/close tabs are live same-day snapshots (time-of-day dependent), not a windowed %; compliance v1 = coaching only until a proper open/close completion-rate feed exists. Glenvale: F1 270->1.15, audit 4.67->3.68, compliance(coaching 80.6%)->2.62 => Operations 2.48; RMS 4.14->3.98, RTW 45%->1.69 => People 2.83.

compliance.openclose_status: Open check completed today; close pending (evening). Live same-day snapshot only — no windowed % fed yet.
